title: IIEST Shibpur – Faculty – 16 Posts
applyMode: Online only (SAMARTH Portal + Google Form) - at https://iiestsrec.samarth.edu.in
shortInfo: IIEST Shibpur Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 16 vacancies for Professor, Associate Professor and Assistant Professor posts. Candidates can apply online only from 20.05.2026 to 12.0.2026 through IIEST Shibpur website iiests.ac.in.

basic_details.job_title: IIEST Shibpur Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 16 Posts
basic_details.short_information: IIEST Shibpur Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 16 vacancies for Professor, Associate Professor and Assistant Professor posts. Candidates can apply online only from 20.05.2026 to 12.0.2026 through IIEST Shibpur website iiests.ac.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Various Academic Units, IIEST Shibpur, Ministry of Education (MoE), Govt. of India
basic_details.application_mode: Online only (SAMARTH Portal + Google Form) - at https://iiestsrec.samarth.edu.in

age_limit.age_details: Fresh appointment beyond 60 years is discouraged as per Institute norms

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in relevant/equivalent discipline from a recognized University/Institute with First Class in all preceding degrees (bachelor's degree onwards). Candidates obtaining Ph.D. directly after B.E./B.Tech. are eligible.

salary_details.pay_scale: Level 10 / Level 12 / Level 13A2 / Level 14A in the Pay Matrix as per 7th CPC

selection_process: Scrutiny & Shortlisting, Teaching & Research Seminar, followed by Personal Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply through both the SAMARTH Portal at https://iiestsrec.samarth.edu.in and the Google Form at https://forms.gle/Mw6tKmTjTrP3Q3oW6. Applications submitted only through SAMARTH Portal or only through Google Form will not be considered.
seo_tags: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology Shibpur Faculty Recruitment 2026
